title: Police accountability: rapid review
body: "In October 2024, the Home Secretary and the Lord Chancellor appointed Timothy Godwin OBE QPM and Sir Adrian Fulford to rapidly assess whether there is a case for change in relation to:    the legal test for use of force in police misconduct cases and whether it should be raised to the criminal standard   the threshold for determining a short-form conclusion of unlawful killing in inquests    Following extensive evidence gathering between November 2024 and May 2025, the reviewers recommend amending the Police (Conduct) Regulations 2020 to apply the criminal law test for use of force in misconduct cases. On unlawful killing, the report advises a full public consultation before any decision on a change to the standard of proof for unlawful killing inquest conclusions. "
